Add copyright footer with 2026

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add read_unread mode — only fetch new posts, no --since needed

When "read_unread": true is set in ~/.tg-reader.json, the skill tracks
the last-read message ID per channel and returns only new posts on
subsequent runs. On first run (no state), --since applies as usual
(default 24h). When state exists, --since is ignored — all unread
posts are returned regardless of time. Use --all to bypass tracking.

commit.message:
Add cross-card drag-and-drop: move items between any visible cards

Lift DndContext from ChecklistCard to CascadingCards so all items across
all visible cards share one drag context. Items can now be dragged between
parent and child cards, dropped into nest zones of items in different cards,
and placed at the end of any card via a droppable end-zone. Circular drops
(into own descendants) are blocked. Adds DragOverlay for cross-card visual
feedback and crossCardCollision detection that picks the topmost card when
cards overlap.

commit.message:
Close SQL and Redis connections after integration tests

Bun.sql and Bun.redis create connection pools that persist after
the test runner exits, leaving zombie connections that accumulate
across repeated runs until PostgreSQL hits max_connections.

commit.message:
Fix mintty input: replace input() with _input() using sys.stdin.readline

Python's input() on Windows uses the Windows console API (ReadConsole/
WriteConsole), which is invisible in mintty — prompts never appear and
responses are lost. _input() uses sys.stdout.write + sys.stdin.readline
for regular file I/O that works correctly through mintty's pipe.

commit.message:
refactor(qa): move QA into Handler layer as SSOT

Embed QA directly into ExecuteSeedHandler and EvolveStepHandler,
eliminating duplicated _call_qa() in ralph.py. MCP tool responses
are now self-contained with QA verdicts.

- ExecuteSeedHandler: add skip_qa param, call QAHandler after
  successful execution, append verdict to response text + meta
- EvolveStepHandler: add skip_qa param, call QAHandler on
  continue/converged + execute=true, append QA Verdict section
- ralph.py: delete _call_qa(), pass --no-qa as skip_qa to
  evolve_step, parse QA from ### QA Verdict section only
- ralph.sh: pass --no-qa flag through to ralph.py
- SKILL.md docs updated for run, ralph, evolve

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix no-unsafe-return for process.env in getApiBase

Locally @types/bun provides a typed ProcessEnv so process.env
indexing returns string | undefined. In CI without that type,
it resolves as any, triggering no-unsafe-return. Assign to a
typed local variable to make it safe regardless of env types.

Fix clear_screen: repair recursive bug and use scroll separator for mintty

The replace-all that created clear_screen() accidentally made the else
branch call itself recursively. Fix by restoring os.system(CLEAR) for
non-mintty. Also replace unreliable ANSI clear in mintty with a scroll
separator so prompts stay visible instead of being cleared off screen.

chore(ci): exclude v7.x archive dirs from instruction format validator

prefix so only current-generation instruction files are validated on push.

Fix mintty buffering: reconfigure stdout at module level with line_buffering

Move UTF-8 reconfigure before any output runs and add line_buffering=True
so every print() flushes immediately (mintty pipes stdout, blocking
buffering by default). Also replace os.system(CLEAR) with clear_screen()
which uses ANSI escape in mintty since cmd.exe 'clear' does nothing there.

commit.message:
fix(ui-server): restore index.html on unclean process exit [#914] (#915)

Register a process.on('exit') handler in createIndexHtmlStasher that
restores index.html when the process exits without a clean shutdown.
The 'exit' event fires for crashes, uncaught exceptions, and signal
handlers that call process.exit() — covering the gap where SIGINT/
SIGTERM/SIGHUP handlers couldn't run.

The only unrecoverable scenario is SIGKILL, which the existing crash
recovery in stash() already handles on the next startup.

Closes #914

Co-authored-by: vertz-dev-front[bot] <2828126+vertz-dev-front[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix str_to_double_bits infinite loop and multiple codegen improvements

str_to_double_bits used int (32-bit under clang) for mantissa parsing
and IEEE754 bit manipulation, causing UB on shifts >= 32 and overflow
on large mantissas (e.g. 9.223372036854774784e-83). Changed all
64-bit-requiring variables to long, which is 8 bytes under both clang
and the self-hosting compiler. sqlite3.c compilation: 100+ min → 5s.

Also includes: union sizeof fix, tentative definition dedup in globals,
emit_mov_imm right-shift UB fix, forward declarations for clang compat,
and Makefile updates (warning flags, test batches 100-102).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: uninstall removes all matching resources with pagination

Uninstall methods now use client.paginate() instead of client.get()
to find resources across all pages, and remove all matches instead
of returning after the first. Return type changed from bool to int.
